title: mimosa tricephala var. nelsonii
intro: Mimosa tricephala var. nelsonii, also known as Mimosa hostilis or Jurema, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Mimosa tricephala var. nelsonii include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as insomnia, epilepsy, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Mimosa tricephala var. nelsonii can be made by extracting the root bark, which can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or applied topically as a cream or ointment.
